title: Digital banks & apps — explore on official sites
intro: Apps and FX can be excellent — but local acceptance for salary, rent, and some billers still needs a separate check. Use these links to compare plans, not to skip reading contracts.

items.reason: Dutch-licensed digital bank — often compared for English-first flows and faster remote onboarding when ID checks pass.
Spending and multi-currency controls — validate payroll and Dutch direct-debit needs vs a full local account.
Mobile euro account some EU movers already know — confirm current NL product, fees, and protections before relying on it.

disclosure: Some links may be affiliate or referral links. If you use them, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you. Ordering reflects page relevance, not pay-to-rank placement. Always confirm scope, pricing, and terms with the provider directly.
